Faculty of Medicine

About the Faculty

MENU

Vision

Istanbul Okan University Faculty of
Medicine aims to provide undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in
accordance with the development of innovative physicians with the competence to
meet the changing needs of global health problems, to develop evidence-based
medical knowledge, and to provide health services aimed health promotion.

Mission

The mission of Istanbul Okan University Faculty of Medicine is to create learning environments that provide access to evidence-based medical and human sciences information resources to future physicians who embrace the founding philosophy of the Republic of Turkey are sensitive to the global health problems, and have the knowledge, skills and values necessary to provide high quality health care.

Our Medical Education Program is designed to ensure that our physician trainees are prepared and equipped to meet the health needs of communities with diverse demographics by encouraging critical thinking, compassion and continuous learning.

The medical education process of Istanbul Okan University Faculty of Medicine focuses on the training of well-rounded, ethical, competent and accountable physicians who have adopted improving individual and community health outcomes as a social responsibility, covering all components of medical knowledge, clinical practice and scientific research.

Values

Social responsibility, transparency and social accountability in information on educational processes and results

Respect for human, patient and physician rights

Commitment to ethical values, defence of ethical values

Continuous professional development and continuous learning competence

To provide services without discrimination of language, religion, gender and race
